cs:atlasone:hero.title: AtlasOne.
cs:atlasone:hero.description: To support global sales onboarding, our team partnered with Sales Training to streamline the transition between Nevro’s Salesforce app and AtlasOne. Together, we created 15+ instructional videos that simplified complex workflows, then refined the experience through feedback from 20+ global partners to improve usability, reduce confusion, and accelerate platform adoption.

cs:atlasone:sections.heading: This project is protected.
cs:atlasone:sections.body: Due to proprietary company information, the full case study lives behind a password. Enter it to view the high-level overview of the work and my role .

cs:atlasone:sections.heading: One unified platform for two merging companies.
cs:atlasone:sections.body: When Globus Medical acquired Nevro, things got interesting. Two platforms, new workflows, and a global sales team that needed to hit the ground running—it was the perfect recipe for chaos. Instead of letting the confusion take over, we turned complexity into clarity by redesigning the onboarding experience between Nevro's Salesforce app and AtlasOne. Through collaborative workshops, rapid prototyping, and 15+ instructional videos, we transformed a complicated transition into a smoother, more intuitive experience for sales reps around the world.

cs:atlasone:sections.caption: Mapping the end-to-end workflow across Salesforce and AtlasOne.
The streamlined permanent-implant path on the unified platform.

steps.t: Enter Procedure Date in Opportunity & Create DBRF

cs:atlasone:sections.caption: The warranty replacement flow, mapped end to end.

cs:atlasone:sections.heading: Internal Technical Requirement Specs
cs:atlasone:sections.body: We identified critical UI pivot points- introducing new fields for Trial, Perm, Revision procedures- to ensure transactional integrity.

cs:atlasone:sections.heading: Make the unfamiliar feel learnable.
cs:atlasone:sections.body: As the Primary E-Learning Designer, I led the creation of the end-to-end workflow, designing a scalable learning experience that aligned business processes with learner needs. The modules opened with merger context and key term definitions before guiding users through a seamless transition from the Salesforce app into AtlasOne, directly reflecting the original user flow.

items.label: Global Sales Adoption:
items.body: Seamlessly integrated across the international sales force.

items.label: Cross-Functional Synergy:
items.body: Unified leadership across IT, Sales, Training, and Finance.

items.label: Operational Efficiency:
items.body: Eliminated redundant workflows and manual data entry.

cs:atlasone:sections.caption: I even received special recognition from the CFO for my dedication to supporting the company’s mission as the sole e-learning designer, consistently going above and beyond to serve our customers.
cs:atlasone:sections.title: 💗 A Little Moment of Appreciation
